hero_badge: EU AI Act Compliant · Bloom's Taxonomy · Socratic Method
hero_subtitle:
It doesn't give you the answers. It helps you find them.
Adaptive, certified, EU AI Act compliant.
euai_body:
The EU AI Act classifies AI systems used in education as HIGH-RISK SYSTEMS (Annex III). Fines up to €15 million or 3% of global turnover.

InSchool is the only Italian educational platform designed with native blockchain governance to meet these obligations from day one.
euai_footnote: Also compliant with Italian Law n. 132/2025
how_subtitle: Three things no other educational AI does together.
how_1_body: Every coach question is calibrated on Bloom's Taxonomy. You reach the answer on your own.
how_2_body: The dynamic cognitive profile anticipates where you'll get stuck — before it happens. It improves session after session.
how_3_body: Skills become NFT credentials verifiable by schools, universities, and companies. Immutable.
profile_junior_body: Socratic method with analogies from your interests. Personalizable coach. Wellbeing with PFA protocol.
profile_high_body: Adaptive cognitive profile. The coach already knows where you'll get stuck. Focus timer and task management.
profile_uni_body: Peer-level mentor. Bibliographic research, exam management, on-chain verifiable credentials.
profile_teacher_body: Generate Bloom-based assessments. Monitor your class. Get recognition for the real work you do.
verify_subtitle: Enter the credential code to verify in real time.
verify_invalid: No credential found with this code.
verify_footer: No personal data stored · EU AI Act compliant · © InSchool
home_hero_sub: Helps you understand and supports you when you need it most.
home_hero_body: InSchool guides every student with a personalised and reassuring coach, to build method and autonomy, and helps teachers make learning simpler and more effective.
home_split_title: Choose the right path for you
home_split_s_body: The path designed to help you understand better, build method and experience learning with more peace of mind.
home_split_d_body: The path dedicated to educators, to support learning, observe progress and make educational work simpler, more personalised and effective.
home_why_body: InSchool was born from a single vision: making learning more human, personalised and effective. That's why it offers distinct paths for students and teachers, adapting language, tools and support to the real needs of each.
home_how_title: Simple to use. Powerful in results.
home_how_1: Enter the right path — Students and teachers access an experience built for their real needs.
home_how_2: InSchool adapts — The experience changes based on level, context and goals.
home_how_3: Learning becomes clearer — More method, more continuity, more support when it truly matters.
home_diff_1_body: Adapts to the real needs of students and teachers, to learning level and educational context.
home_diff_2_body: Helps students understand better and teachers make learning simpler and more effective.
home_diff_3_body: Combines support, safety and responsibility in a single experience.
home_trust_6: Developed in line with the key principles and requirements of the EU AI Act
home_trust_link: Learn more about security and compliance
home_final_title: More method. More trust. More future.
home_final_body:
InSchool is for those who want to grow by learning.
And for those who every day help others do the same.
st_hero_sub: Helps you understand and supports you when you need it most.
st_hero_body: InSchool guides every student with a personalised and reassuring coach, to build method, autonomy and confidence.
st_ben_1_body: Doesn't give you the ready answer. Guides you to reason, step by step.
st_ben_2_body: Helps you organise better, think more clearly and become more independent.
st_ben_3_body: When studying gets heavy, InSchool helps reduce stress, frustration and tension.
st_emo_title: When learning is hard, InSchool doesn't leave you alone
st_emo_body: The difficulty isn't always in the task: sometimes it's in the exhaustion, confusion or fear of not making it. InSchool offers a reassuring educational presence, capable of restoring confidence and continuity.
st_grow_title: Doesn't just help you today. Makes you grow over time.
st_grow_body: InSchool isn't just born to solve a task. It helps you develop method, autonomy and confidence, so learning becomes more natural.
st_how_title: Simple to use. Powerful in results.
st_how_1: Add your homework — Quickly and easily.
st_how_2: The coach makes it clearer — Every task is broken into understandable, manageable steps.
st_how_3: Study with real guidance — Asks you questions, helps you reason and walks you to understanding.
st_who_title: One coach, different ways to help you
st_who_elem_body: Simple, reassuring support to tackle homework with more confidence and less stress.
st_who_medie_body: More structured support to build method and regain confidence in hard moments.
st_who_sup_body: More method, more clarity and more autonomy to handle study, tests and pressure.
st_who_uni_body: A coach to better organise your journey and tackle study with continuity and awareness.
st_who_uni_3: More continuity toward exams and goals
st_fam_title: More peace of mind in learning. At home too.
st_fam_body: InSchool reduces tension, confusion and frustration. For students it means feeling more capable; for parents, having concrete and more human support.
st_diff_title: Not your usual AI that just answers
st_diff_1: Doesn't replace the student — Helps them become more independent.
st_diff_2: Doesn't just help with the task — Trains method, reasoning and real understanding.
st_diff_3: Doesn't treat everyone the same — Adapts to age, level and moment.
st_final_title: More method. More trust. More future.
st_final_body: Start with InSchool and discover a more human, guided and effective way to learn and grow.
doc_hero_title: The educational AI that supports your work.
doc_hero_sub: And makes learning easier to accompany.
doc_hero_body: InSchool helps teachers follow students better, personalise support and make educational work clearer, more effective and sustainable.
doc_ben_1_body: You have more visibility on students' progress, difficulties and real needs.
doc_ben_2_body: InSchool helps adapt support based on level, age and path.
doc_ben_3_body: Reduces friction, waste and lost time, so you can focus on what matters.
doc_val_title: A tool that strengthens, not replaces, the teacher's role
doc_val_body: InSchool doesn't replace the teacher. It supports them with tools to follow progress and intervene in a more targeted way.
doc_how_title: Simple to use. Useful every day.
doc_how_1: Enter your space — Find an environment designed for educational work, with tools to prepare materials, build assessments and follow your students' paths.
doc_how_2: Prepare materials in one click — Generate exercises, level content by difficulty and prepare assessments calibrated to the class level. In seconds, not hours.
doc_how_3: Check learning with more clarity — You have a real picture of who understands and who doesn't, without waiting for the next oral exam.
doc_who_1_body: To better support students, with more clarity and less dispersion.
doc_who_2_body: To better observe learning paths and support educational work more effectively.
doc_who_3_body: To support students in their academic journey with tools that integrate classroom work.
doc_diff_1: It's educational — Born to support learning, not to bypass it.
doc_diff_2: It's personalised — Adapts to students, contexts and real needs.
doc_diff_3: It's responsible — Built for safety, transparency and trust.
doc_final_title: Discover how InSchool can help you make educational work simpler, more personalised and sustainable.
doc_new_hero_sub: Create materials, monitor your class, save time.
doc_new_hero_body: InSchool helps teachers prepare lessons, tests and personalized materials — with an AI assistant that knows your class.
doc_new_ben_1_body: Tests, lessons, exercises, remedial and advanced worksheets — AI-generated and ready for your class.
doc_new_ben_2_body: Instant overviews of progress, recurring difficulties and emotional patterns across your class.
doc_new_ben_3_body: Automate repetitive work and focus on what really matters: teaching.
doc_new_how_1b: Sign up, enter your subjects and school level. You're ready in under a minute.
doc_new_how_2b: Create classes, invite students with a code and start tracking progress.
doc_new_how_3b: Describe what you need and the AI generates the complete material — you review, edit and assign it.
doc_new_who_1_body: Manage large classes with differentiated materials and student wellbeing monitoring.
doc_new_who_2_body: Create Bloom-level tests, targeted exercises and complete lesson plans ready for the classroom.
doc_new_who_3_body: Generate academic materials, track student progress and optimize preparation time.
doc_new_time_body: InSchool doesn't replace the teacher — it gives back the time they deserve. Less admin, more teaching.

trust_2_desc: Experience designed with care for age, context and vulnerability.
trust_3_desc: The coach doesn't give the answer: it guides reasoning.
trust_6_desc: It's not just study. If something weighs on you, the coach notices and helps find the right support.

trust_7_desc: Not just the work you produce. Also the load you carry. And when the period is tough, someone notices.
trust_4_desc: Consents, progress and skills managed securely, traceably and verifiably through Azar Chain, InSchool's private blockchain.
trust_5_desc: In line with regulations for AI use in schools and universities.

home_new_hero_sub: It doesn't replace you. It makes you better.
home_new_hero_body: The first AI coach that takes care of learners and teachers.
home_new_split_s_body: More clarity, more method, more peace of mind in studying.
home_new_split_d_body: More support, more continuity, more effectiveness in educational work.
home_new_diff_s1_body: The coach unblocks you immediately. No more hours staring at the page.
home_new_diff_s2_body: Doesn't give you the answer: helps you reason, remember and build method.
home_new_diff_s3_title: The time you save is yours
home_new_diff_s3_body: Less blocks, less frustration. More space for what you want to do.
home_new_diff_d1_body: Tests, exercises and structured activities. What took you an hour now takes two minutes.
home_new_diff_d2_body: Concrete help to manage workload, priorities and daily complexity.
home_new_diff_d3_body: Everything you create stays, gets organised and can be reused over time.
home_new_how_1_body: An experience designed around the real needs of students and teachers, not a generic solution.
home_new_how_2_body: The coach observes, learns and calibrates over time. To your way of studying or teaching, your mood, your personality.
home_new_how_3_body: More method, more continuity, more support when needed. Without replacing you.
home_new_bc_badge: Azar Chain · Private Blockchain · Chain ID 24780
home_new_bc_sub: InSchool uses a private blockchain to certify student competencies and ensure compliance with European AI regulations in education.
home_new_bc_1_body: Every skill achieved becomes a non-forgeable digital certificate, verifiable by schools, universities and companies in real time.
home_new_bc_2_body: All AI operations are recorded immutably, ensuring transparency and traceability as required by European regulations.
home_new_bc_3_body: Every consent, progress and decision is tracked on-chain. Verifiable by authorities and institutions at any time.
st_new_hero_label: For those who want to understand, not just finish
st_new_hero_sub: The AI coach that helps you reason, build method and face study with more peace of mind.
st_new_hero_body: InSchool is the first AI coach that adapts to your way of learning, guides you without giving you the answer, and supports you even when studying gets heavy.
st_new_session_sub: The coach walks you through step by step — doesn't give you the answer, helps you find it.
st_new_review_sub: After each session, you know exactly where you are and what you need to review.
st_new_review_body: The system monitors what you've studied and reminds you to review before you forget. With quizzes, flashcards and targeted sessions.
st_new_coach_title: One coach, different ways to help you
st_new_elem_body: Simple, reassuring support, step by step, with age-appropriate language.
st_new_medie_body: More structured help to build method, regain confidence and grow in autonomy.
st_new_sup_body: More method, more organisation, more clarity to handle study, tests and pressure.
st_new_uni_body: A mentor to organise your academic journey and face every exam with continuity.
st_new_emo_title: It's not just study. It's also support.
st_new_emo_body: When learning gets heavy, the coach notices. Accompanies you without judging, helps you find focus again, and if needed, activates support for parents.
st_new_emo_1_body: The coach monitors your emotional state session after session. Without judging.
st_new_emo_2_title: Helps you get back on track
st_new_emo_2_body: If you're struggling, it suggests lighter activities, breaks or change of approach.
st_new_emo_3_title: If needed, alerts someone who can help
st_new_emo_3_body: With the student's consent, the system can discreetly and respectfully notify parents.
sec_hero_body: InSchool is built to comply with European regulations on artificial intelligence in education — from the EU AI Act to child protection.
sec_why_title: Why security in educational AI is different
sec_why_body: AI systems used in education are classified as HIGH-RISK SYSTEMS by the EU AI Act (Annex III). This means specific obligations of transparency, traceability and data protection — especially when users are minors.
sec_arch_1_body: Azar Chain — private blockchain (Chain ID 24780) to record consents, progress and credentials immutably and verifiably.
sec_arch_2_body: Four deployed contracts to manage roles, governance, consents and credentials. All verifiable on-chain.
sec_arch_3_body: Every AI session is logged with complete metadata. The coach doesn't give answers — it guides reasoning.
sec_euai_body: How we meet the 7 obligations for high-risk AI systems in education.
sec_euai_1_body: Complete documentation of identified risks, mitigation measures and continuous monitoring protocols.
sec_euai_2_body: On-chain certification of data provenance, quality and processing used by the AI system.
sec_euai_3_body: Architecture, algorithms, datasets and decision processes documented and available for competent authorities.
sec_euai_4_body: Every AI interaction recorded with timestamp, context and metadata on immutable blockchain.
sec_euai_5_body: Clear information for students, families and institutions on how the system works and how data is used.
sec_euai_6_body: The system is designed to support, never replace, human judgment. Parents and teachers maintain control.
sec_euai_7_body: Continuous testing, model validation and performance monitoring to ensure reliability over time.
sec_gdpr_1_body: No personal data is sold or used to train external models. Data collection minimisation.
sec_gdpr_2_body: Integrated PFA protocol for emotional wellbeing. Parent alerts when needed. Age-appropriate content.
sec_gdpr_3_body: No underage student data is processed without on-chain certified parental consent, revocable at any time.
sec_cta_title: Want to know more about our technical architecture?

home_cta_final_body:
InSchool is for those who want to grow by learning.
And for those who every day help others do the same.
sec_hero_sub: Designed to earn the trust of students, families, teachers and institutions.
sec_arch_4_body: No minor's personal data is processed without on-chain certified parental consent, revocable at any time.
sec_sc_sub: Four deployed contracts to manage roles, governance, consents and credentials. All verifiable on-chain.
sec_euai_sub: InSchool is classified as a high-risk AI system in education. We implement specific measures for transparency, human oversight and protection of vulnerable users.
sec_euai_warning: The EU AI Act classifies AI systems in education as high-risk. The compliance deadline is August 2026. InSchool is already compliant.
footer_gdpr_notice: InSchool processes personal data in compliance with GDPR (EU Reg. 2016/679). Data controller: Tenks S.r.l.s. — inschool.privacy@azarlabs.com
coach_how_help: How can I help you today?
coach_delete_confirm_body: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
coach_clear_class_body: All class chat messages will be deleted. The chat will remain available.
coach_delete_chat_body: This will delete the entire conversation. This cannot be undone.
coach_fallback: Sorry, I couldn't respond. Please try again shortly.
gc_auto_start: Yes, let's go! Ask me questions.
gc_photo_check: I photographed my notebook with my completed exercises. Can you check my answers?
gc_init_study: Hi {{name}}! Today we're studying "{{title}}"{{subject}}. I have the page text and I'll ask you questions to help you understand and memorise everything. Let's go!
gc_init_photo_page: Great {{name}}! I have the page in front of me{{subject}}. Let's work on "{{title}}". I'll analyse the exercise and prepare your review...
gc_init_photo: Great {{name}}! I already have the activity text{{subject}}. Let's start here: {{description}}.
gc_init_photo_fallback: let's look at what the exercise asks together
gc_init_oral_frustrated: I understand it can seem like a lot, {{name}}. But let's take it one step at a time — I'll ask you some questions about "{{title}}"{{subject}} to see where we start.
gc_init_oral_tired: You're tired, {{name}}, that's okay. Let's keep it light: I'll ask you a few questions about "{{title}}" and see what you remember. No stress!
gc_init_oral: Great {{name}}! Today we're studying "{{title}}"{{subject}}. I'll ask you some questions right away to see what you already know — then we'll dig deeper where needed!
gc_init_frustrated_reading: I understand it can seem difficult, {{name}}. Let's take it one step at a time: who or what is the passage about?
gc_init_frustrated: I understand it can seem difficult, {{name}}. Let's take the first small step together — just that one. What does the assignment say?
gc_init_tired_reading: You're tired, {{name}}, that's okay. Let's start with a simple question about the passage: what's the main event you read about?
gc_init_tired: You're tired, {{name}}, that's normal. Let's just do one micro-step, then see how it goes. What does the exercise ask?
gc_init_reading_text: Great {{name}}! I'll ask you questions about the passage to see if you understood it well. Let's start: who or what is the text about?
gc_init_reading: Great {{name}}! Let's do reading comprehension. Tell me in 2 sentences what you read and then I'll ask targeted questions.
gc_init_free_reading: Great {{name}}! I see you need to read. Which book or chapter are you reading? Tell me a bit!
gc_init_default: Great {{name}}, let's begin! {{taskInfo}} What does the assignment say?
gc_recovery_photo: Great {{name}}! I already have the task{{subject}}. I'll look at it and we'll start together.
gc_fb_reading_help: Okay, let's go back to the passage. Who or what is at the centre of the text?
gc_fb_reading_check: Good, let's check right away. What's the most important fact told in the passage?
gc_fb_reading_default: Here's a question about the text: who is the protagonist, or what is the passage about?
gc_fb_help: Take a breath. It's normal to feel this way. Let's just take one small step — what's the first thing you see in the exercise?
gc_fb_stuck: No problem! Let's re-read the assignment together. What exactly does it ask you to do?
gc_fb_hint: A small hint: look carefully at the data you have. What do you notice? Is there something you already know?
gc_fb_understood: Fantastic! Explain to me in your own words what you understood. Let's see if we're on track!
gc_fb_default: Let's start with a precise step: what exactly does the assignment ask?
privacy_s1_body: Welcome to InSchool. This privacy policy describes how AzarLabs ("We", "Our") collects, uses and shares your personal information when you use our website or services (the "Ecosystem").
privacy_s2_body: We collect limited personal data primarily intended to provide the educational experience. This includes name, age, location, school information and conversation and learning history through our AzarLabs AI.
privacy_s3_body: Queries generated within the app are processed by advanced artificial intelligence models. No PII (Personal Identifiable Information) from minor accounts is knowingly sent in LLM API payloads.
privacy_s4_body: You have the right to access, rectify or delete your personal information at any time by contacting privacy@azarlabs.com. Parents can permanently delete the student account from their dashboard.
tos_s1_body: InSchool is an AI educational coaching platform developed by Tenks S.r.l.s. through AzarLabs Division. Access to the service is subject to acceptance of these terms.
tos_s2_body: To access the service you must create an account providing truthful information. Underage users must obtain consent from a parent or legal guardian.
tos_s3_body: The user agrees to use InSchool for personal educational purposes. It is prohibited to: share accounts, use the service for illegal activities, or attempt unauthorised access to systems.
tos_s4_body: Content produced by the AI coach is for educational and support purposes. It does not replace the professional judgment of teachers, psychologists or doctors. In cases of significant emotional difficulties, InSchool guides toward professional support.
tos_s5_body: Materials created by teachers through InSchool remain the property of the teacher. AI-generated content belongs to Tenks S.r.l.s.
tos_s6_body: Tenks S.r.l.s. reserves the right to suspend accounts in case of violation of these terms.
tos_s7_body: InSchool does not guarantee specific academic results. The service is provided "as is" in compliance with applicable regulations.
tos_s8_body: These terms are governed by Italian law. For any dispute, the Court of Catanzaro has jurisdiction.
cookie_what_body: Cookies are small text files saved on the user's device during browsing.
cookie_third_body: InSchool does not use advertising cookies and does not share data with advertisers.
cookie_manage_body: You can manage or disable cookies in your browser settings or through the banner in the app. Disabling technical cookies may affect the functioning of the service.
cookie_consent_body: On first access, a banner is shown for consent to optional analytics cookies. Technical cookies do not require consent as they are necessary for operation.
euai_commitment_body: InSchool is developed in line with the key principles and requirements of the European Artificial Intelligence Regulation (EU AI Act), with a compliance deadline of August 2026.
euai_classification_body: InSchool is classified as an AI system for educational use. As such, it adopts specific measures of transparency, human oversight and protection of vulnerable users.
euai_m1_body: users are always informed that they are interacting with an AI system. The coach never presents itself as human.
euai_m2_body: the AI coach supports — does not replace — the judgment of teachers and families.
euai_m3_body: specific protocols by age group, mandatory parental consent for children under 14.
euai_m4_body: every AI session is recorded with an immutable log on Azar Chain to ensure complete audit trail.
euai_m5_body: the system is designed not to amplify biases related to gender, ethnicity, disability or socioeconomic background.
euai_blockchain_body: InSchool uses Azar Chain (Chain ID 24780) — a proprietary private blockchain — to immutably and verifiably record AI session logs. This ensures compliance with the traceability obligations of the EU AI Act.
chat_send_stuck: I'm stuck — try a different approach and help me more simply.
chat_send_example: Give me a practical example to understand better.
chat_send_step_by_step: Explain it step by step, more slowly.
chat_send_shorter: Explain it more briefly and directly.
mockup_student_coach_1: Hi Marcus. Today you have maths and history. Where do you want to start?
mockup_student_coach_2: Great. Quick question — have you studied algebraic expressions before or is this your first time?
mockup_teacher_coach: The Science test for 3G is due tomorrow — only 3 students have completed it. How do you want to proceed?
mockup_review_coach: You have two things due tomorrow. Shall we start with the most urgent?
mockup_session_coach: You've read the passage. Tell me in your own words what this paragraph is about.
forgot_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot_help_text: We'll send you a secure link to reset your password.
forgot_sent_body: Check your inbox and follow the instructions to reset your password.
not_found_body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
rafforza_empty_title: You don't have any content to strengthen yet
rafforza_fallback_level1: No critical concepts found — here are the ones you can still improve.
rafforza_fallback_level2: Great job — no weak points detected. Here's a complete review.
celebration_body_junior: Amazing! You did some great thinking today!

parent_daily_summary_unavailable: Today's summary is not available at the moment. Try again shortly.
session_inactivity_warning: Are you still there? I haven't received any responses in the last 10 minutes. If you've stepped away, I'll pause the session so we don't lose your progress. Come back whenever you're ready! 😊

class_join_not_found: Code not found. Check with your teacher.
class_join_already: You're already enrolled in this class.
class_join_error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
class_join_prompt: Have a class code? Join your teacher's class
class_no_classes: You're not enrolled in any class yet. Enter a code to join.
class_leave_description: Do you really want to leave the class {{name}}? You can rejoin anytime with the code.
onb_class_code_description: If your teacher uses InSchool, enter the code to connect to their class. You can also do this later from your profile.
auth_age_min_14: You must be at least 14 years old to register.
auth_age_min_18: You must be at least 18 years old to register as a teacher.
auth_parental_consent_minor: I have my parents' consent to use this service, including AI-based data processing
auth_fill_all_fields: Please fill in all required fields
auth_age_min_6: Minimum age to create a profile is 6 years
auth_choose_role_desc: Choose your profile to start registration
auth_role_student_desc: Primary, middle or high school — managed by parent or independent if over 14
auth_role_university_desc: Adult, manage your academic journey independently
auth_role_teacher_desc: Manage classes, teaching materials and monitor your students
auth_role_parent_desc: Create and manage your children's profiles, monitor their progress
auth_role_adult_desc: Personal use for continuous learning and professional development
auth_underage_warning: Under 14? Ask your parent to register as "Parent" and create your profile. You can log in with the Magic Code!
auth_magic_code_link: Log in with Magic Code (minor student)
auth_magic_code_desc: Use the code generated by your parent
auth_account_created: Account created! Check your email to confirm registration.
auth_fill_name: Please fill in first and last name
auth_fill_dob: Please enter your date of birth
auth_underage_body: Ask your parent to register and create your profile from the app. You can log in with the Magic Code.
auth_min_18_university: You must be at least 18 years old to register as a university student.
auth_parental_consent_parent: I confirm that I am the parent or legal guardian and consent to the processing of the minor's data under Art. 8 GDPR
auth_teacher_declaration_desc: This information helps us personalize your experience
auth_report_desc: The report will be handled confidentially.
auth_report_placeholder: Describe the reason for the report...
mat_badge_teacher_tooltip: This material contains solutions and grading rubrics reserved for the teacher
mat_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this material and all its versions?
mat_regen_prompt: You modified the base material. Do you want to regenerate the BES, DSA and H versions?
mat_delete_step1: Do you want to delete "{title}"? All associated BES, DSA, and H versions will also be deleted.
mat_delete_step2_desc: This action is irreversible. Type the material title to confirm.
action_study_coach_desc: The coach guides you step by step
action_free_study_desc: Choose a topic and study with the coach
onb_interests_sub: Select things you like — the coach will use them to make studying more fun! (optional)
profile_access_code_desc: Use this code to access InSchool without email and password.
settings_discoverable_label: Make my profile visible to students at my school
settings_discoverable_desc: Students at your school will be able to find you during registration
